description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a playful design, featuring prominent cat ear-shaped extensions on the headband. The headphones are primarily pink with soft, padded gray ear cushions for comfort during extended use. The headband is also padded and adjustable, ensuring a secure fit for various head sizes. The ear cups are circular and appear to have a mesh or grille pattern on the exterior, likely for aesthetic or acoustic purposes. A cable extends from one of the ear cups, indicating a wired connection for audio input. The overall design is whimsical and modern, appealing to users who enjoy both functionality and a touch of personality in their electronics.
description: Pink over-ear headphones with cat ear-shaped headband and gray padded ear cushions, featuring a wired connection and playful design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cat ears, padded headband, and full ear cups with visible gray cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cup, the cable exit, and the profile of the cat ear extension.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the cat ears and the headband's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the other ear cup, cable, and the side profile of the headband and cat ear.
